name: Men's Matte Plastic Aviator Sunglasses with Mirrored Lenses - All In Motion™ Black: Scratch-Resistant, UV Protection, Recycled Frame
description:
Why we're ALL IN:

Matte black sunglasses designed in a classic aviator shape. Made from recycled plastic with a wide facial fit. Green mirrored lenses are made with UV protection to block the sun's rays and are scratch-resistant to keep them looking great for longer.

All in Motion™: Inspiring the potential in every body.
